1877900.name: Orbit Simulator
1877900.description:
The Orbit Simulator is a lightweight solar system simulation. It's a fun little space where you can play with physics and make music!

It features a procedurally generated galaxy background full of nebula and stars! Manipulate the masses of different CELESTIAL BODIES and watch gravity do it's work! Visualize how pitch and volume affect sound waves! And make music with a tiny Channel Rack!
